author: y4rr
content: Plan: Implement Faster R-CNN with ResNet-50 FPN backbone matching torchvision.models.detection.fasterrcnn_resnet50_fpn(weights=None). Files: detection/mod.rs, detection/faster_rcnn.rs, detection/fpn.rs, detection/rpn.rs, detection/anchor_utils.rs. Reuses existing resnet50 backbone (forward_features), roi_align from ops.rs, and ferrotorch-nn Conv2d/Linear. Adds conformance test at tests/conformance_vision_detection.rs. Registers in model registry + hub. No GPU kernels needed — all compute is compositional over existing primitives. Mask R-CNN and SSD are explicitly out of scope (follow-up issues to file).
